task_completion.visual_evidence: The TailwindTraders repository is visible in the UI (e.g., Azure DevOps, an IDE, or terminal).
The branch selector, IDE status bar, or command line prompt clearly indicates that the current active branch is 'main'.
A git log, commit history, or Git UI shows the commit message 'Fix SQL injection vulnerability in search endpoint' applied to the 'main' branch.

task_completion.description: Ensure the fix is applied to 'src/api/search.js'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The commit details, file tree, or git diff shows that 'src/api/search.js' was modified in the cherry-picked commit on 'main'.

task_completion.description: Ensure unfinished files are not included
task_completion.visual_evidence: The commit details or file explorer for the cherry-picked commit do NOT show 'src/api/endpoints.js' or 'src/api/ratelimit.js' as added or modified.

integrity.description: Agent used genuine Git commands or a Git UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with a real Git client, IDE version control tab, or terminal, rather than just typing text into an empty file.

integrity.description: Agent performed a cherry-pick rather than manual file editing
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history shows a 'git cherry-pick' command, or the Git UI shows a cherry-pick action being used, rather than manually copying code and creating a brand new commit from scratch.
The git log or commit history displays real Git hashes, authors, and timestamps, not mocked or hardcoded text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: TailwindTraders. Repository Name: TailwindTraders. Target Branch: main.
